parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
actor Programador

box "LEA" #lightgray
participant "front: Ceed" as front
participant "agent: Ceed" as agent
end box

front -> front : see(addBrain, brain)
activate front
deactivate front

front -> front : see('listen', port)
activate front
deactivate front

Programador -> front : ws://lea
activate front
front -> front : see('onSocketConnection', socket)
activate front
front --> Programador : socket.emit(agents)
deactivate front

Programador -> front : see(agent, action, args)
activate front
front -> agent : see(action, args)
activate agent
agent --> front
deactivate agent
front --> Programador : resolve()
deactivate front

Programador -> front : http://lea/:agent/:action
activate front
front -> front : see('http', [req, res])
activate front
front -> agent : see(action, [req, res])
activate agent
agent --> front
deactivate agent
front --> Programador : res.send()
deactivate front
deactivate front

@enduml
```
